Belgium

Iran

Supervisor: Prof. Mohammad Reza Aref

GPA: 4/4

::: {.cv-entry}

### B.Sc. in Electrical Engineering

**Sharif University of Technology**  
Iran

### High School Diploma

**Allameh Helli 1**  
Iran  
**2011--2015**

Aggregate diploma grade: 19.84 out of 20

## Master’s Thesis Supervision

- Henri Cattoire, **“Enhancing Privacy in the Solid Protocol through Attribute-Based Encryption,”** 2025.
- Fernando Javier López Cerezo, **“Towards Self-Blindable Anonymous Credentials from Lattices,”** 2026.

## Reviewing and Subreviewing

I have served as a subreviewer for the following conferences:

- IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy (**S&P**), 2027.
- ACM Conference on Computer and Communications Security (**CCS**), 2026.
- IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy (**S&P**), 2026.
- International Conference on Cryptology and Network Security (**CANS**), 2025.
- USENIX Security Symposium, 2024.

## Visiting Research

- Research visit to Prof. Anja Lehmann’s group at the Hasso Plattner Institute (HPI), University of Potsdam, Germany, 2025.

## Awards and Honors

- Silver medal, Iran National Physics Olympiad, 2014.
- Member of Iran’s National Elites Foundation, since 2014.
- Accepted without entrance exam to the M.Sc. program in Secure Communications and Cryptography at Sharif University of Technology, 2019.

## Teaching Assistant Experience

- Teaching Assistant, **Logic Circuits and Digital Systems**, 2018--2019.
- Teaching Assistant, **Cryptography**, 2020--2021.
- Teaching Assistant, **Advanced Cryptography**, 2020--2021.
- Teaching Assistant, **Selected Topics in Cryptography**, 2021--2022.
